title: Form Submission with API
description:
Build a contact form that submits data to an API with proper validation, loading states, and success/error feedback.

### Requirements

- Form fields: name, email, message (all required)
- Client-side validation before submit (show inline errors)
- Show a loading/spinner state on the submit button while POST is in flight
- Disable the form during submission
- On success: show a success message and reset the form
- On error: show an error message (keep form data intact)
- Email must be a valid format (basic check)

### Test IDs

| Element | data-testid |
|---------|-------------|
| Name input | `name-input` |
| Email input | `email-input` |
| Message textarea | `message-input` |
| Submit button | `submit-btn` |
| Name error | `name-error` |
| Email error | `email-error` |
| Message error | `message-error` |
| Success message | `success-msg` |
| API error | `api-error` |
constraints:
- Must use fetch API for the POST request
- Validation must happen before the request is sent
- Form must be disabled during submission
- Success must clear the form
- Error must preserve form data
hints: Validate on submit, not on every keystroke. Check each field and set individual error messages.
Use a simple regex for email: /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/
Disable all inputs and the button while isSubmitting is true. Use the `disabled` attribute.
